content:
Undertaking for Custom Bid / BoQ Creation on GeM
File number: CRFQ 1000445656 - TENDER FOR “SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT
TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU
HEATER AT BPCL MR”.
Date: 14.11.2025
Subject: Undertaking for Creation of Custom Bid / BoQ for Goods / Services required on GeM
1. Goods / Services Required (Please specify the exact goods / services required): SERVICE
CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF
HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR
2. Search String Used in the GeM Availability Report & Past Transaction Summary (Please state the
exact search string used to find suitable categories): Supply, Installation, Commissioning and
Maintenance
3. GARPTS ID (mention GeM Availability Report ID): GEM/GARPTS/12112025/669L3DT7AUZ3
4. Categories to which notification was sent:
Category 1: Repair, Maintenance, and Installation of Plant/ Systems/Equipment (Version 2)
Category 2:
Category 3:
5. Undertaking:
I understand that the creation of a custom bid/BoQ is an exceptional process and should only be
used when existing categories on GeM are not suitable for the required goods / services.
I, undertake the following:
 I have conducted a thorough search string using the search string mentioned above and
determined that existing categories are not appropriate for the required goods/services.
 I have provided an accurate and detailed description of the required goods/services in section
1.
 I have selected the most relevant categories for notification in section 4.
 I am fully prepared to justify the need for a custom bid/BoQ to GeM upon request.
Signature
(Name, Designation, Organization, Department, State)
